S1_avatar.notes: Very authentic 90s yearbook feel. Crew-neck sweater, round glasses, natural film grain texture. Laser backdrop in correct blue/magenta. Warm smile. Good face likeness. Clean without yearbook-page clutter.

S2_edit.notes: Denim jacket replacement successful. Background preserved. Similar quality to baseline and other skills. Preservation constraints well followed but jacket detail not significantly improved.

S3_poster.notes: Beautiful gold/navy design with decorative typography. All text present and correct. Time rendered as '6:00 PM - 9:00 PM' instead of '6-9 PM' (minor deviation). Added 'Open to All Berkeley Students' line. Violin, trumpet, treble clef, gold border. Very polished.

S4_character.notes: Stunning portrait-orientation full body concept art. Dramatic cape spread, extremely prominent purple energy veins creating circuit-trace patterns. Energy sword. Low angle with rain. However neon signs say NEO TOKYO/RAMEN — setting feels more Tokyo than NYC. Highest visual quality across all S4 tests.

method: Natural language narrative briefing, camera/lighting language, material specifics, purpose context
